title: Glowing Glassy Irish Passata Skewers
description: A tangy and festive Irish dish featuring passata, with a glassy jelly texture, shaped like nigiri and grilled to perfection on a robata grill.
instructions: In a small bowl, sprinkle the gelatin over 1/4 cup of cold water and let it sit for 5 minutes to soften.
In a medium saucepan, combine the passata, irish whiskey, lemon juice, honey, salt, and pepper, and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and add the softened gelatin, stirring until it is fully dissolved.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until set.
Just before grilling, thread a small piece of the passata mixture onto each bamboo skewer, shaping it into a nigiri shape.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking, then grill the skewers over medium heat for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Serve with additional passata sauce on the side, if desired.
